title: Come Play With Us
lesson: Inviting someone who is alone to join in makes everyone happier.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight. The person from the input image stands on the far left tossing a colourful ball, facing the camera with a happy expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} catches the ball, laughing. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, warm sunlight — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, holding the colourful ball in both hands and pausing, facing the camera with a thoughtful, caring expression and the face fully visible, looking toward the bench. In the background on the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} sits alone on the wooden bench looking sad and left out. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} sits looking up hopefully from the wooden bench. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} play together with a colourful ball, everyone included. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a sunny outdoor playground — a slide and swings, a wooden bench, soft grass, golden afternoon light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left with arms around their friends, facing the camera with a warm, proud smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} grin happily beside them. Exactly three children in the frame and no one else. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: You were at the playground, tossing a ball with your friend. Catch! You both laughed.
Then you saw a boy sitting all alone on a bench. He looked sad and left out.
You walked right over with a friendly smile. "Come play with us!" you said, reaching out your hand.
His face lit up, and he took your hand and stood. Now he had friends to play with!
Everyone played together with the ball. Nobody was left out, and everyone was happy.
You wrapped your arms around your friends with a proud smile. Including everyone made the best day.
